SEARCH
Package fr.gouv.vitam.storage.cold.server.simulator.service

Class InaService

java.lang.Object
fr.gouv.vitam.storage.cold.server.simulator.service.InaService
public class InaService extends Object
Main service orchestrator Delegates to specialized services: - InaIoService: write/read operations - InaLibraryService: robotic commands (sleep-only) and status queries (static responses)
